id.description: The id of the list entry

userId.description: The id of the user owner of the list entry

progress.description: The amount of episodes/chapters consumed by the user

progressVolumes.description: The amount of volumes read by the user

repeat.description: The amount of times the user has rewatched/read the media

private.description: If the entry should only be visible to authenticated user

hiddenFromStatusLists.description: If the entry shown be hidden from non-custom lists

customLists.description: Map of booleans for which custom lists the entry are in

advancedScores.description: Map of advanced scores with name keys

startedAt.description: When the entry was started by the user

completedAt.description: When the entry was completed by the user

updatedAt.description: When the entry data was last updated

createdAt.description: When the entry data was created
